name: hermes-webui-devtools
description: Hermes Web UI — Python Flask backend + vanilla JS frontend. MCP server for LLM integrations. See ARCHITECTURE.md for full details.

scripts.build: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('python3 --version'); execSync('python3 -m py_compile server.py mcp_server.py'); } catch { try { execSync('python --version'); execSync('python -m py_compile server.py mcp_server.py'); } catch { console.log('No python interpreter found, skipping py_compile'); } }" && npm run lint:runtime
scripts.type-check: echo 'Python app — use mypy if needed'
